message:
Apply cargo fmt and clippy fixes to VFS and record modules

- record.rs: Reorder imports alphabetically (cargo fmt), reformat
  multi-line assert_eq! macro invocation
- traits.rs: Reorder imports (cargo fmt), return &'static str from
  Vfs::name() since all implementations return string literals,
  collapse multi-line fn signature to single line
- memory.rs: Extract lock_err() helper to reduce repetition of
  lock-poisoned error construction, replace match with if-let per
  clippy::single_match_else, add explicit drop(inner) for
  significant_drop_tightening, chain method calls on lock() for
  delete/access, remove redundant comments on full_pathname

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
